category_title: Child with ASD, ADHD, and Specific Learning Disability exhibiting academic resistance and behavioral outbursts
scenario_title: Phonemic awareness instruction and letter sound retrieval
minimal_context: Sam and his tutor are sitting in a quiet spot for a one-to-one lesson to practice identifying letter sounds.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the letter we learned this morning. Tell me what sound it makes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to remember the sound.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, let's look at this new letter instead. What sound do you think this one makes?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the letters off the table and begins to scream) No! I'm not doing it!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at the letter we learned this morning. Tell me what sound it makes.

STUDENT: I don't want to read.

TUTOR: Just try your best to remember the sound.

STUDENT: I don't know it!

TUTOR: Okay, let's look at this new letter instead. What sound do you think this one makes?

STUDENT: (Pushes the letters off the table and begins to scream) No! I'm not doing it!
